finding_results.notes: Retained the walls/silence formulation only in the calibration-bay introduction. Reworked the other three ambient-noise mentions so they now do separate work: floor-borne vibration in Kai's body, the vent hiss making the room feel occupied, and corridor ventilation sanding the edges off his footsteps.

summary: Addressed the repeated ambient-noise sentence template by keeping one calibration-bay instance and revising the other three references into distinct sensory effects on Kai.
